name: hdri-library
title: HDRI Library
description: Browse and download high-quality HDRI images from Poly Haven.
author: chad_ashley

commands.name: find-hdri
commands.title: Browse HDRIs
commands.subtitle: Poly Haven
commands.description: Search and download high-quality HDRI images from Poly Haven in multiple resolutions and formats.

preferences.name: downloadDirectory
preferences.title: Download Directory
preferences.description: Where to save downloaded HDRIs. Defaults to ~/Downloads if empty.

preferences.name: defaultFormat
preferences.title: Default Format
preferences.description: Preferred file format for quick downloads.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
